title: inula klingii
intro: Inula klingii, also known as the Tibetan inula, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Inula klingii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Inula klingii is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its roots and leaves can also be used to make various medicinal preparations, such as tinctures and poultices.
